CREATE TABLE json_data (id INT, content VARCHAR);

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_test_1() { DECLARE input_string VARCHAR; DECLARE parsed_tree ANY; input_string := (SELECT content FROM json_data WHERE id = 1); parsed_tree := json_parse(input_string); RETURN parsed_tree; };

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_test_2() { DECLARE input_string VARCHAR; DECLARE parsed_tree ANY; input_string := (SELECT content FROM json_data WHERE id = 2); parsed_tree := json_parse(input_string); RETURN parsed_tree; };

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_test_3() { DECLARE input_string VARCHAR; DECLARE parsed_tree ANY; input_string := (SELECT content FROM json_data WHERE id = 3); parsed_tree := json_parse(input_string); RETURN parsed_tree; };

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_complex() { DECLARE json_string VARCHAR; DECLARE parse_result ANY; json_string := '{ "data": {"list": [{"name": "John", "age": 30}, {"name": "Jane", "age": 25}]}}'; parse_result := json_parse(json_string); RETURN get_keyword('list', parse_result); };

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_nested_query() { DECLARE nested_result ANY; nested_result := (SELECT json_parse('{ "results": {"data": [ {"info": {"name": "item1"}}, {"info": {"name": "item2"}}] } }}')); RETURN get_keyword('data', nested_result); };

CREATE PROCEDURE json_tree_with_condition() { DECLARE json_string VARCHAR; DECLARE condition_result ANY; json_string := (SELECT content FROM json_data WHERE id = 1); condition_result := json_parse(json_string); IF condition_result IS NOT NULL THEN RETURN get_keyword('key', condition_result); ELSE RETURN NULL; END IF; };
